task_completion.description: Log into the LibreHealth EHR application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the dispensary or inventory management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page related to Inventory, Dispensary, or Drugs is open in the LibreHealth EHR interface.
The text 'Ibuprofen 200mg' is visible in an inventory list, table, or edit form.

task_completion.description: Set the Reorder Level for Ibuprofen 200mg to 150.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for 'Reorder Level', 'Reorder Point', or similar safety stock setting associated with Ibuprofen 200mg contains the value '150'.
The text 'Metformin 500mg' is visible in an inventory list, table, or edit form.

task_completion.description: Set the Reorder Level for Metformin 500mg to 60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for 'Reorder Level', 'Reorder Point', or similar safety stock setting associated with Metformin 500mg contains the value '60'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the LibreHealth EHR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying LibreHealth EHR, not a terminal or command prompt executing SQL queries or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the actual LibreHealth EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should point to the local LibreHealth instance, and the interface should not be a text editor or a locally created mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent must not bypass the EHR UI using database administration tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of phpMyAdmin, Adminer, or other direct database manipulation tools being used to alter the drug records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target drugs are 'Ibuprofen 200mg' and 'Metformin 500mg'. Initial on-hand inventory values in the system are 500 units for Ibuprofen and 300 units for Metformin, with initial reorder points set to 0. The task requires setting the reorder points to 150 and 60, respectively, via the LibreHealth EHR UI.
